chunkBudgets.maxChunkCountXlsxReason: Bumped from 93 -> 95 for the XLSX import flow. The Documents menu lazy-loads the sheet importer and its JSZip-backed workbook parser only when a user chooses Import XLSX, so normal sheet/doc/slides routes keep their previous download shape while the built asset set gains two deferred chunks.
chunkBudgets.maxChunkCountReason: Bumped from 116 → 119 for mounting `PdfCollab` (comments + presence over the pdf.js viewer) and the owner Share button on the `/f/:id` PDF route. `ShareDialog` now has a fourth importer alongside docs/slides/sheets, so Vite hoists it into its own shared `share-dialog-*.js` chunk instead of inlining it per-route. `PdfCollab`'s thread detail panel reuses `CommentThreadCard`, previously only reachable via the Docs comments panel; with a second async-reachable importer Vite splits it into its own `CommentThreadCard-*.js` chunk. The same reachability-graph change also crosses the hoist threshold for a small `IconTable-*.js` icon chunk — the same second-importer hoist pattern as the `slider`/`presentation`/`avatar-stack` chunks below. Only the owner PDF route and existing docs/slides/sheets owner routes pull in `share-dialog`; only `/f/:id` and `/shared/:token` pull in `CommentThreadCard`. Prior bump: 115 → 116 for the documents-list PDF type icon. The list renders `IconFileTypePdf` from `@tabler/icons-react` (a PDF-specific glyph lucide lacks, requested for the PDF document type). As a second importer of the Tabler icon barrel alongside the app sidebar, Vite hoists the shared Tabler module into its own small chunk — the same second-importer hoist pattern as the `slider`/`presentation` chunks below. Only routes rendering the documents list or sidebar pull it in; the per-chunk KB cap is unchanged. Prior bump: 112 → 115 for the read-only PDF viewer at /f/:id. The new lazy `FileDetail` route pulls in its own `file-detail-*.js` route chunk plus a dedicated `pdf-*.js` chunk for `pdfjs-dist` (reached only via `await import("pdfjs-dist")` inside `PdfViewer`, never a static top-level import, so the ~1.5 MB engine stays off the main bundle and out of every other route). `@/api/files` (pdfFileUrl/uploadPdf) now has a second lazy importer — the documents list and the new file-detail route — so Vite hoists it into its own small shared `files-*.js` chunk, same pattern as prior `slider`/`presentation` hoists below. Only `/f/:id` visitors download the pdf.js engine chunk; other routes are unaffected. The pdf.js worker (`pdf.worker.min.mjs`, ~1.25 MB) is referenced by `?url` and copied as a plain asset, not a JS chunk, so it is outside this budget entirely. Prior bump: 111 → 112 for per-deck slide size (the 4:3 PPTX import fix + the Format-panel 'Slide size' control). The new `deckSlideHeight` accessor (and `SLIDE_WIDTH`) is now imported from the slides `model/presentation` module by several separately-split slides surfaces — the desktop SlidesView, MobileSlidesView, the thumbnail panel, insert-image, and the new format-panel Slide-size section — so Vite hoists `model/presentation` into its own shared `presentation-*.js` chunk. Only slides routes pull it in; sheets/docs routes are unaffected. Prior bump: 109 → 111 when Docs spell check vendored the en_US Hunspell dictionary (packages/docs/src/spell/dict/en_US.{aff,dic}) and lazy-loaded it via `import('./dict/en_US.dic?raw')`. Vite splits the .dic (~552 kB) and .aff (~3 kB) raw imports into two dynamic-import chunks downloaded only when spell check initializes in the Docs editor; the main docs entry stays ~346 kB with no dict inlined. Other routes (sheets/slides) are unaffected. Prior bump: 108 → 109 when the slides ThemedColorPicker gained a Transparency (alpha) slider: it now imports the shared Radix `Slider` primitive that previously had a single importer (the format-panel drop-shadow section). With a second importer reached through the separately-split slides toolbar subsections, Vite hoists Slider into its own shared `slider-*.js` chunk. Only the slides editor route pulls it in; sheets/docs routes are unaffected. Prior bump: 101 → 108 when shared-document.tsx lazy-loaded the slides editing side panels (ThemePanel / FormatPanel / MotionPanel) for editor-role slides shares, bringing the share-link editor toolbar to parity with the owner route. Vite splits each panel and its contextual sub-sections (format-panel size/position/effects, motion-panel transition/animation) into their own dynamic-import chunks, so the slides editor-share route gained ~7 deferred chunks. Only editor-role slides share-link visitors download them; view-only slides shares and sheets/docs shares are unaffected. Prior bump: 100 → 101 when Docs PDF export gained curated Google Font embedding: pdf-actions.ts lazy-imports the generated font-files.data (per-family TTF URLs) only on Export PDF, so Vite splits it into its own deferred chunk downloaded solely by PDF exporters — the docs editor route is unaffected. Prior bump: 97 → 100 when shared-document.tsx lazy-loaded MobileSlidesView so the slides share-link route mounts the mobile shell (view-only SlideRenderer / light editor) on phones instead of the cramped desktop SlidesView. Vite splits MobileSlidesView and its mobile-only dependencies into their own dynamic-import chunks, so the slides share-link route gained ~3 chunks. Only slides share-link visitors on a phone download them; desktop share routes and sheets/docs shares are unaffected. Prior bump: 96 → 97 when the Cmd+/ shortcuts-help modal landed: components/shortcuts-help-dialog split out as a shared primitive consumed by docs-view, sheet-view, and slides-view (all three are lazy-loaded route surfaces), so Vite hoists the dialog into its own dynamic-import chunk. Each app's thin wrapper (docs-shortcuts-help, sheets-shortcuts-help, slides-shortcuts-help) still ships in the route chunk. Prior bump: 95 → 96 when the documents list grew a presence avatar column: components/avatar-stack split out as a small shared primitive consumed by both DocumentPresenceAvatars and the in-editor UserPresence. Prior bump: 90 → 93 when shared-document.tsx lazy-loaded SlidesToolbar alongside SlidesView for editor-role slides shares — Vite splits the toolbar's contextual subsections (idle / object / text-edit / mobile) into their own dynamic-import chunks, so the share-link route gained ~3 chunks. Only slides share-link visitors download them; sheets/docs share routes are unaffected. Prior bump: 85 → 90 in the Slides toolbar redesign — extracting the docs text-formatting controls into shared components/text-formatting/{style,format,paragraph}-group plus the new slides toolbar split (insert / arrange / object / image / text-element / text-edit sections) added measured chunks (87). +3 headroom absorbs the next incremental primitive. Prior bump: 80 → 85 when shared-document.tsx lazy-loaded SlidesView for slides share links.

overrides.reason: PDF export bundle (pdf-lib + fontkit), loaded only when user clicks Export PDF
Docs PDF painter (pdf-lib + fontkit), split off from pending-imports after the slides addition; loaded lazily on PDF export

Slides editor bundle — @wafflebase/slides (model + canvas renderer + editor + interactions) plus the @wafflebase/docs layout engine reused for text-element rendering, loaded only when navigating to a /p/:id Presentation route. v2 can split editor from renderer if the budget tightens.
